$comment: The fleet manifest (docs/MECHANIZATION_PLAYBOOK.md, Conversion 3) — the single source of the metro fleet, served at https://chidistricts.com/metros.json by the Pages deploy. Runtime behavior is deliberately unchanged: the app never fetches this file. It is consumed at GENERATION time — `generate_metro_files.py --sync-fleet` projects these entries (minus `repo`) into each fork's worksheet metro_explorers, and the weekly fleet-status workflow reads `repo` to aggregate across forks. Launching metro N+1 means: add its entry here, then run --sync-fleet + regenerate in each fork (a regeneration PR, never a hand edit).
